metadata.description: ATV-Phoenix — a self-healing harness for AI coding agents (objective sense + bounded heal + tamper-evident trace).

plugins.name: phoenix
plugins.description: Self-healing harness: gives Copilot phoenix_sense / phoenix_snapshot / phoenix_heal / phoenix_verify_trace so it objectively verifies success and recovers from silent failures instead of self-judging. Run /phoenix-setup once to register the agent + MCP server.
